name: Electrolyte Blend
summary: Electrolyte blends are most useful for rehydration when sweat loss, heat exposure, diarrhea, vomiting, or prolonged exercise increases sodium and fluid needs; they should not be treated as a fat-loss or energy shortcut.
description: Electrolyte blends are most useful for rehydration when sweat loss, heat exposure, diarrhea, vomiting, or prolonged exercise increases sodium and fluid needs; they should not be treated as a fat-loss or energy shortcut.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
